title: n8n as an Agent Orchestrator — Patterns & Anti-Patterns
concept: n8n is a postman, not a brain. Use it for scheduled ingestion, fan-out/fan-in, human-in-the-loop gates, and cross-system glue. Keep reasoning inside MCP servers or LangGraph; keep prompts in git; never treat n8n's vector store as canonical.
why_it_matters: The orchestrator-vs-agent-runtime split is the most common architecture mistake in enterprise AI workflows. Getting it right is a repeatable consulting insight.
learn_5min: Read n8n's AI Agent node docs + one MCP client node tutorial. Confirm your n8n version has @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.mcpClient.
apply_10min: Import the provided 'Daily Twin Nugget Delivery' workflow JSON; trigger manually; verify MCP → LLM → HTTP → Slack chain executes.

reference_projects.name: n8n AI Starter Kit
reference_projects.description: Official Docker template with n8n + Ollama + Qdrant + Postgres — production-grade starter.

reference_projects.name: n8n-io/n8n
reference_projects.description: Main repo; watch releases for MCP client node updates.

reference_projects.name: n8n community workflows
reference_projects.description: Searchable library of shared workflows — steal patterns from.

consulting_angle: Sell 'AI Workflow Architecture Reviews' — 1-week engagement, delivered as an ADR fixing brain-in-the-postman anti-patterns.
twin_platform_hook: n8n is layer 4 (orchestration). Calls MCP tools, never reasons. The provided workflow JSON is the daily-delivery skeleton.

title: Twin Reference Architecture End-to-End (5 Layers)
concept: Five layers: L1 Storage (graph+vector+object+keyword), L2 Knowledge API (OKF-MCP server), L3 Agents (LangGraph supervisor + specialists), L4 Orchestration (n8n + GitHub Actions), L5 Surfaces (any MCP client). Dev loop: Codex → GitHub → CI (SHACL + Ragas + Twin Rubric) → deploy.
why_it_matters: The single artifact that aligns every stakeholder in seconds. Missing this shared map is half of enterprise AI failure.
learn_5min: Trace one query through all 5 layers on paper: surface → orchestrator → agents → MCP server → storage → back.
apply_10min: Create docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with the layer diagram, component versions table, and decision log. This becomes your ADR record.

reference_projects.name: arc42
reference_projects.description: Proven open-source template for pragmatic architecture documentation.

reference_projects.name: Backstage TechDocs
reference_projects.description: Dev-portal-grade documentation rendering when the team scales.

consulting_angle: 'Twin Platform Blueprint' as a 2-week advisory package (€10–20k). Interview + tailored 5-layer map + ADR template. High margin, sets up implementation upsell.
twin_platform_hook: Everything maps to a layer. When something breaks, you know where. When something new arrives, you know which layer it enters.

title: Guardrails — Hallucination Control, PII, Prompt Injection
concept: Three layered defenses: (1) citation gate rejects responses without OKF citations, (2) Presidio-based PII+secret redaction on input and output, (3) sandwich-wrap all untrusted content and require intent on every write tool.
why_it_matters: A single hallucinated fact or PII leak kills a regulated-industry engagement. Guardrails move the twin from demo to deployable IP.
learn_5min: Skim OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications + a canonical prompt-injection explainer.
apply_10min: Save guardrails.py; run the demo; then wire guardrail_pipeline() as the final step of your Reasoning Agent and wrap_untrusted() around every retrieved snippet.

reference_projects.name: Microsoft Presidio
reference_projects.description: Production-grade PII detection and anonymization SDK.

reference_projects.name: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails
reference_projects.description: Declarative rails (Colang) for input, output, and topic control.

reference_projects.name: Guardrails AI
reference_projects.description: Structured output validation and policy enforcement.

consulting_angle: Sell 'Twin Safety Baseline' as a fixed-scope €15k deliverable — citation gate + PII redaction + injection wrap + rubric rejection. Every regulated client buys it.
twin_platform_hook: Guardrails wrap L3 (agents) and L2 (MCP writes). Log rejections to :GuardrailEvent nodes — compliance evidence + prompt-improvement backlog.

title: Continuous Learning Loops — Daily Interactions → OKF
concept: Four loops at different cadences: reinforcement (real-time confidence nudges), consolidation (nightly transcript→facts), decay (weekly half-life), ratification (human-approved new nodes). Only humans mint new node types.
why_it_matters: Makes it a twin, not a snapshot. Auditable via PROV-O — every confidence change tracked.
learn_5min: Re-read Mem0 consolidation docs; skim Zep temporal knowledge graph concept.
apply_10min: Save learning_loops.py; call reinforce() from your Reasoning Agent; schedule consolidate_session() and apply_decay() in n8n.

reference_projects.name: Mem0 auto-fact-extraction
reference_projects.description: Reference consolidation implementation extracting facts from conversations.

reference_projects.name: Zep temporal KG
reference_projects.description: Temporal knowledge graph with edge weighting and decay.

reference_projects.name: Letta reflection
reference_projects.description: Self-editing memory research including consolidation heuristics.

consulting_angle: 'Continuous Learning Loop Design' as Phase-3 engagement (€20–30k, 4 weeks) after platform + safety are shipped.
twin_platform_hook: Four loops turn the platform from installed to alive. Without them, OKF is a museum; with them, it compounds daily.

title: Productizing the Twin — Offerings, Pricing, Delivery Motion
concept: Five-rung offering ladder from €10k Blueprint → €250k Platform → €8k/mo Retainer. Diagnostic anchors the sales motion; each engagement improves the reference implementation that sells the next.
why_it_matters: A twin as hobby = €0 asset. Productized = €200–500k/year practice with defensible IP (ontology + rubric + reference architecture are yours forever).
learn_5min: Skim Jonathan Stark 'Hourly Billing Is Nuts' + one Blair Enns 'Win Without Pitching' chapter.
apply_10min: Draft docs/PRACTICE.md with positioning, ICP, 5-rung offering ladder, sales motion, proof assets, non-goals. Share with 3 peers this week.

reference_projects.name: Jonathan Stark — Value Pricing
reference_projects.description: Canonical framework for productizing consulting services.

consulting_angle: The twin platform IS the consulting flywheel — every engagement improves the reference implementation that sells the next engagement.
twin_platform_hook: Your own twin becomes the demo asset that closes deals. Live > slides. Nothing else in the market does that yet.
